name: Fidelity
collaborationStyle: educational integration, sponsored segment, brand awareness
notes: Heavily regulated — requires compliance review; CPM is high but process is slower

name: Intuit (TurboTax / QuickBooks)
collaborationStyle: tax season campaign, small business story, software walkthrough
notes: Seasonal spikes around tax season; TurboTax deals widely available across creator sizes

name: Coinbase
collaborationStyle: crypto explainer, platform walkthrough, market commentary
notes: High CPM but heavily regulated; requires careful compliance language; strong fit for crypto and investing creators

name: American Express
collaborationStyle: rewards story, travel integration, premium lifestyle segment
notes: Very selective; strong fit for travel-finance crossover creators and high-income audience channels

name: Monarch Money
collaborationStyle: budgeting tutorial, app walkthrough, personal finance story
notes: Fast-growing Mint alternative; actively seeking finance and lifestyle creator partners

name: Acorns
collaborationStyle: beginner investing story, round-up feature demo, financial wellness segment
notes: Great fit for personal finance creators targeting beginners or Gen Z audiences

name: Public.com
collaborationStyle: investing explainer, platform review, portfolio walkthrough
notes: Social investing platform; strong fit for stock market and investing creators with younger audiences

name: Credit Karma
collaborationStyle: credit score story, financial health segment, app walkthrough
notes: Extremely recognizable brand; easy integration for any personal finance creator; wide creator range accepted

name: Seeking Alpha
collaborationStyle: stock analysis integration, investing research story, premium tool demo
notes: Premium stock research platform; high CPM due to affluent investor audience; best for serious investing channels

name: Masterworks
collaborationStyle: alternative investing story, art as asset class, platform walkthrough
notes: Art investing platform; one of the highest CPM sponsors in finance; active YouTube sponsorship program

name: Blossom
collaborationStyle: investing explainer, app review, beginner finance tutorial
notes: Stock market social app targeting Gen Z investors; high CPM for small niche audiences

name: Copilot Money
collaborationStyle: budgeting app walkthrough, financial clarity story, routine integration
notes: Beautifully designed budgeting app for Apple users; ideal for creators who blend finance with productivity or lifestyle

name: Carry
collaborationStyle: solo 401k explainer, self-employed finance story, tax-advantaged investing
notes: Retirement account platform for self-employed creators and freelancers; highly relevant to the creator economy itself

name: Composer
collaborationStyle: automated investing demo, algorithmic trading story, quant-lite content
notes: No-code automated investing platform; strong fit for quant-curious or data-driven finance creators

name: Tally
collaborationStyle: debt payoff story, credit card management demo, financial freedom narrative
notes: Automated credit card debt manager; strong emotional hook for creators covering debt payoff or financial recovery stories

name: Titan
collaborationStyle: wealth management story, hedge-fund-style investing demo, premium investing segment
notes: App offering institutional-style investing to retail investors; highest CPM tier in emerging finance brands
